rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. PETER KARSANT et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 31, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFFS NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS, EKATERINE PANOUTSOPOULOS' Motion To Sever And Stay The Fifth Cause Of Action Of Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint. OFF CALENDAR for this action. The motion appears to have been filed in a wrong case. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 31, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT DORIS WONG'S Motion For A Protective Order. DENIED. Parties are ordered to meet and confer and agree on terms of a protective order limited to the discovery of issues relating to this action. A copy of the stipulated proposed order to be presented to the Court by 9:15 a.m. on January 31, 2017. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Plaintiffs Tiffany Barber, Sarah Sharaf, And Matthew Pinna For An Order Compelling Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandezs Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions, Costs And Fees Pursuant To Ccp 2023.010(D), 2031.300(C) And 2030.290(C) As Against Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandez And Defense Counsel Karen Uchiyama
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 31, 2017, line 3. Plaintiffs Tiffany Barber, Sarah Sharaf, And Matthew Pinna's Motion For An Order Compelling Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandezs Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions, Costs And Fees Pursuant To CCP 2023.010(D), 2031.300(C) And 2030.290(C) As Against Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandez And Defense Counsel Karen Uchiyama. GRANTED. Complete verified responses to be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of order as to interrogatories 1-26 and 30; 27, 29 - subject to defendants redacting personal identifying information of tenants other than plaintiffs; 28 - only to the extent Wong has handbooks and guides he uses regarding landlord's responsibilities; 31, 32 - as to communications concerning the plaintiffs only. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Of Plaintiffs Tiffany Barber, Sarah Sharaf, Matthew Pinna, For Order Deeming Truth Of Matters Admitted As To Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandez; Request For Monetary Sanctions, Costs And Fees Pursuant To Ccp 2023.010 (D), 2033.280(C) As Against Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandez And Defense Counsel Karen Uchiyama
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 31, 2017, line 3. Plaintiffs Tiffany Barber, Sarah Sharaf, Matthew Pinna's Motion For Order Deeming Truth Of Matters Admitted As To Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandez; Request For Monetary Sanctions, Costs And Fees Pursuant To CCP 2023.010 (D), 2033.280(C) As Against Defendants Ralan Wong And Patty Hernandez And Defense Counsel Karen Uchiyama. DENIED. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SONG KOCHAPHUM VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing for Tuesday, January 31, 2017, line 5. Osc: Re Preliminary Injuction. DENIED. Plaintiffs failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits on any of their claims. See White v. Davis (2003) 30 Cal.4th 528 and Hunt v. Sup. Ct. (1999) 21 Cal.4th 984. =(501/REQ)
